title: RayChassis [Fabric]
description: A simple Create based modpack designed for survival
body:
# RayChassis

A simple Create based modpack designed for survival, containing Terrestria (+ sister mods), Chipped, Simply Optimised.
This pack is designed for a survival-centred gameplay experience.

## Credits

Credit to [HyperSoop](https://modrinth.com/user/HyperSoop) for [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) modpack.

Credit to [Terrarium](https://modrinth.com/user/Terrarium) for [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) mod.

Credit to [the Terraformers Orginisation](https://modrinth.com/organization/terraformers) for [Cinderscapes](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes), [Traverse](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/traverse) and [Terrestria](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/terrestria).

Credit to [tropheusj](https://modrinth.com/user/tropheusj) for [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) (and to [simibubi](https://modrinth.com/user/simibubi) for [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)).

Credit to [ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland) for [Early Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/early-loading-screen).

Credit to [ThatGravyBoat](https://modrinth.com/user/ThatGravyBoat) for [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped).

And Finally, credit to [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/project/raychassis/settings/description) for [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

I have not created/edited any of the mods listed above.

Some sections of this pack are under MIT or Apache-2.0.
